title: Increase pricing for free Gemini models
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Balancing the Gemini scales
gist.blurb: We've updated the pollen requirements for our Gemini models to ensure fair usage and keep the hive running smoothly.
gist.summary: Updated the pricing structure for Gemini models in the text registry to better balance system resources.
gist.impact: Users will see adjusted pollen credit requirements when using gemini-fast and gemini-search models.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot adjusting weights on a scale or organizing glowing gems (representing Gemini) in a garden, symbolizing balance and resource management.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carefully balancing glowing blue gems on a wooden scale in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carefully balancing glowing blue gems on a wooden scale in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
